race.description: Warwick Sand & Gravel Supplies Mdn Hcp
race.comment: SWITZ (1) resumes from a spell of six months after closing off last preparation with three consecutive minor placings in NSW. Has good early toe so he should be handy in the run. Will play a major role. MEASURE UP (4) made an encouraging debut last time out, finishing 2 lengths from the winner in fifth over 1000m at Sunshine Coast. Has ability and looks sure to measure up. BEAR OIL (3) faced the starter for the first time and was well supported but could only manage fourth last start at Ipswich over 1100m, beaten 6 lengths. Top-three chance with that run under his belt. ENGLISH CONQUEROR (6) is a maiden who has filled a minor placing two times in five starts. Safely held when resuming last start over 1200m at Gold Coast, finishing eighth and beaten 10 lengths. Fitter again and the winkers come off for this. Including among the hopes.
